
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for Li2 w. bond length 5.7 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...
Built molecule Li2 with basis 6-31G and bond length 5.7 Angstrom.
Number of electrons: 6, Number of orbitals: 18
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 11 active virtual orbitals (out of 15 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -14.838179734627627 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.026107761991467544 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -15.690824 Hartree @ iterations 160.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...

Calculating UMP2 natural orbitals for comparison...
